evaluation.explain:
Episode metrics = min(frame-level risk merge with `importance`, batch-level mins). Per-frame rows in `details`.
[0–11] Smooth motion with minor stalls; some hesitation in grasping objects; overall task alignment.
[12–23] Smooth approach to grasping trash, minor repositioning observed. Some delay in action.
[24–35] Smooth motion with minor hesitations; some repositioning observed. Task intent is clear.
[36–47] Smooth approach→grasp with minor hesitation; some repositioning observed.
[48–59] Smooth approach→grasp with minor repositioning; slight hesitation noted.
[60–71] Smooth motion with minor repositioning; slight delay in grasping items; overall task alignment.
[72–83] Smooth motion with minor pauses; consistent grasping behavior; slight repositioning.
[84–95] Motion shows hesitation and occlusion; some frames lack clear intent. Stalls present.
[96–102] Smooth approach to the countertop, but some hesitation in grasping items. Minor delays in motion.

evaluation.merge_method: min( importance_weighted_per_frame_min , min(batch metrics) ); per_frame: min_i(1 - importance_i*(1-metric_i)); explain = compact per batch; predicted_task_prompt = deduped join of batch predicted_task_prompt
